heading: Procedure
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo return the access logs for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas accessLogs list [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas accessLogs list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-accessLogs-list).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo view the database access history using the API, see
[Access Tracking](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-access-tracking).**Ui:**Atlas UIUse the following procedure to view your database access history
using the Atlas UI:* On the cluster card, click .

* Select View Database Access
  History.or* Click the cluster name.

* Click .

* Select View Database Access History.
